description_long: This is a medium-sized rectangular cardboard shipping box, sealed with clear packing tape along the top seam. The front face is marked with handwritten text reading 'HIVE SPARE DRIVE ALIVE' in black marker, and there are two upward-pointing arrows indicating the correct orientation for handling. The box has a barcode label and a small white sticker on the top, suggesting it has been processed for shipping or inventory. One side of the box shows a taped seam, while the opposite side has a small puncture hole. The cardboard surface is matte and slightly rough, with visible corrugation and minor wear typical of parcels in transit.
description: A medium cardboard shipping box with handwritten labeling, shipping stickers, and clear packing tape, showing signs of handling and a small puncture.
description_view_0: Front view showing handwritten 'HIVE SPARE DRIVE ALIVE' text, upward arrows, and part of the top barcode label.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a taped seam and the edge of the barcode label, with no visible writing.
description_view_2: Rear view with a small puncture hole, barcode, and upward arrows, but no handwritten text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing another taped seam and the edge of the barcode label, similar to view 1.
